title: jasminum harmandianum
intro: Jasminum harmandianum, also known as the Harmand's jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the jasmine family that is native to China and Vietnam. The plant's medicinal properties include its use in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Harmand's jasmine include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality due to its sedative and calming effects. Herbal preparations of Jasminum harmandianum include tea infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
